Package io.github.elevateddev.lattice.graph

package io.github.elevateddev.lattice.graph
Static graph construction, lifecycle, compiled plan metadata, and source specialization contracts.
  • Class
    Description
    DiagnosticsSpec
    Graph-level diagnostic event controls.
    FusionSpec
    Graph-level fusion controls.
    GraphBuildException
    Thrown when a graph plan cannot be compiled or validated.
    GraphCompilationReport
    Immutable build-time report explaining physical runtime decisions for a compiled graph.
    GraphCompilationReport.Controls
    Graph-level controls that influenced compilation.
    GraphCompilationReport.Edge
    Decision row for one logical edge.
    GraphCompilationReport.EdgeUseKind
    Runtime edge-use categories.
    GraphCompilationReport.Fallback
    Explanation for a merge candidate or optimization that did not apply.
    GraphCompilationReport.Merge
    Positive merge decision.
    GraphCompilationReport.MergeKind
    Positive merge categories.
    GraphCompilationReport.OperatorKind
    Executable operator categories.
    GraphCompilationReport.OutputKind
    Output strategy categories.
    GraphCompilationReport.Reason
    Curated compilation decision reasons.
    GraphCompilationReport.Sender
    Decision row for one runtime sender.
    GraphCompilationReport.SenderKind
    Runtime sender categories.
    GraphCompilationReport.SubjectKind
    Fallback subject categories.
    GraphCompilationReport.Worker
    Decision row for one logical worker-capable node.
    GraphCompilationReport.WorkerDecisionKind
    Worker decision categories.
    GraphPlacementSpec
    Graph-level controls for runtime-derived placement behavior.
    GraphPlan
    Immutable description of a graph after validation and compilation.
    GraphPlan.Edge
    Immutable edge metadata in a compiled graph plan.
    GraphPlan.Node
    Immutable node metadata in a compiled graph plan.
    GraphPlan.NodeKind
    Logical node kinds supported by the public graph DSL.
    GraphPlan.Placement
    Requested placement metadata for one stage worker.
    GraphRuntimeException
    Thrown when a built graph rejects an invalid runtime operation.
    GraphState
    Lifecycle states exposed by StaticGraph.state().
    MetricsSpec
    Graph-level metrics controls.
    PreallocationSpec<T>
    Describes the object pool used by a preallocated source.
    SourceMode
    Declares how a source emitter is used by application threads.
    StaticGraph
    A compiled static topology graph.
    StaticGraph.Builder
    Builder for a validated, immutable static topology.
